10: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
11: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
12: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
13: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
14: import java.time.Instant
15: import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit
16: 
17: @HiltAndroidApp
18: class SMSSentryApp : Application() {
19: 
20:     private val appScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())
21: 
22:     override fun onCreate() {
23:         super.onCreate()
24:         pruneHistory()
25:         warmUpModel()
26:     }
27: 
28:     private fun pruneHistory() {
29:         appScope.launch {
30:             try {
31:                 val db = DeepCheckDatabase.getInstance(this@SMSSentryApp)
32:                 val cutoff = Instant.now().minus(90, ChronoUnit.DAYS).toEpochMilli()
33:                 db.historyDao().pruneOlderThan(cutoff)
34:             } catch (e: Exception) {
35:                 // Database may not be initialized yet
36:             }
37:         }
38:     }
39: 
40:     private fun warmUpModel() {
41:         appScope.launch {
42:             try {
43:                 val entryPoint = EntryPointAccessors.fromApplication(
44:                     this@SMSSentryApp,
45:                     ModelManagerEntryPoint::class.java
46:                 )
47:                 val modelManager = entryPoint.getModelManager()
48:                 modelManager.ensureReady()
49:             } catch (e: Exception) {
50:                 // Model might fail to load, ignore
51:             }
52:         }
53:     }
54: }
